title: agropyron vaillantianum
intro: Agropyron vaillantianum, also known as Vaillant's false brome, is a species of grass native to Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
